name: settings
description: Attribute-driven settings platform. Ships `#[AsSetting]` + `#[SettingGroup]` + `#[SettingField]` — the declarative surface every module writes against. Registry hydrated at boot via foundation's DiscoversAttributes seam. Reads resolve via `system → tenant → user` hierarchy (org/branch levels deferred until scope module lands). Writes fire `SettingsChangeEvent` which is dual-write consumed by activity (tenant-facing feed, tier retention) + audit (compliance trail, 7y cold). HTTP surface `GET/PUT /api/v1/settings/{group}` + `GET /api/v1/settings/schema` for admin UI rendering. Foundation storage layer is spatie/laravel-settings extended with our scope-aware overrides table.

wraps.rationale: Battle-tested settings storage via typed classes. We inherit their `Settings` base class + storage adapter + migration workflow. We add: attribute-driven discovery, scope hierarchy, dual-write audit, HTTP surface, sensitive-field encryption.
